datasets.name: ac7847b3
datasets.displayName: Humanitarian Cluster Needs And Targets 2026 Dataset
queryLines:
SELECT 
`Country ISO3`
,iso3.name AS Country
,CASE
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'ALL' THEN 'Total'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'EDU' THEN 'Education'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'FSC' THEN 'Food, Security and Agriculture'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'HEA' THEN 'Health'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'MPC' THEN 'Multipurpose Cash'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'NUT' THEN 'Nutrition'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'PRO' THEN 'Protection (overall)'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'SHL' THEN 'Emergency, Shelter and NFI'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'WSH' THEN 'Water, Sanitation and Hygiene'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'CCM' THEN 'Camp Coordination and Camp Management'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'MS' THEN 'Refugee Response'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'PRO-CPN' THEN 'Child Protection'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'PRO-GBV' THEN 'Gender-Based Violence (GBV)'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'PRO-MIN' THEN 'Anti-mine Struggle'
WHEN Cluster LIKE 'PRO-HLP' THEN 'Housing, Land and Property'
END AS Description
,Cluster
,Population
,`In Need`
,Targeted
,Targeted/`In Need` AS Coverage
 FROM `workspace`.`default`.`hpc_hno_2026` AS hpc
 LEFT JOIN `workspace`.`default`.`CountryISO3Code` AS iso3 ON hpc.`Country ISO3` = iso3.`alpha-3`
 WHERE `In Need` IS NOT NULL
 ORDER BY Coverage

datasets.name: 99adca61
queryLines:
WITH CSE1 AS (
    SELECT 
        hpc.`Country ISO3`,
        iso3.name AS Country,
        hpc.Cluster,
        hpc.Population,
        hpc.`In Need`,
        hpc.Targeted,
        hpc.Targeted / hpc.`In Need` AS Coverage
    FROM `workspace`.`default`.`hpc_hno_2026` AS hpc
    LEFT JOIN `workspace`.`default`.`CountryISO3Code` AS iso3
        ON hpc.`Country ISO3` = iso3.`alpha-3`
    WHERE hpc.`In Need` IS NOT NULL
    AND (Description NOT LIKE 'Protection générale' AND Description NOT LIKE 'Protection Générale') 
),
CSE2 AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Cluster ORDER BY Coverage, Country ASC) AS Rank,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY Cluster) AS Total
    FROM CSE1
)
,CSE3 AS (
SELECT
    `Country ISO3`,
    Country,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'ALL' THEN Coverage END) AS ALL_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'ALL' THEN Rank END)     AS ALL_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'ALL' THEN Total END)    AS ALL_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'EDU' THEN Coverage END) AS EDU_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'EDU' THEN Rank END)     AS EDU_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'EDU' THEN Total END)    AS EDU_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'FSC' THEN Coverage END) AS FSC_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'FSC' THEN Rank END)     AS FSC_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'FSC' THEN Total END)    AS FSC_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'HEA' THEN Coverage END) AS HEA_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'HEA' THEN Rank END)     AS HEA_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'HEA' THEN Total END)    AS HEA_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MPC' THEN Coverage END) AS MPC_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MPC' THEN Rank END)     AS MPC_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MPC' THEN Total END)    AS MPC_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'NUT' THEN Coverage END) AS NUT_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'NUT' THEN Rank END)     AS NUT_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'NUT' THEN Total END)    AS NUT_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'SHL' THEN Coverage END) AS SHL_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'SHL' THEN Rank END)     AS SHL_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'SHL' THEN Total END)    AS SHL_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'WSH' THEN Coverage END) AS WSH_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'WSH' THEN Rank END)     AS WSH_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'WSH' THEN Total END)    AS WSH_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'CCM' THEN Coverage END) AS CCM_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'CCM' THEN Rank END)     AS CCM_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'CCM' THEN Total END)    AS CCM_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MS' THEN Coverage END) AS MS_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MS' THEN Rank END)     AS MS_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MS' THEN Total END)    AS MS_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-CPN' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_CPN_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-CPN' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_CPN_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-CPN' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_CPN_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-GBV' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_GBV_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-GBV' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_GBV_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-GBV' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_GBV_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-MIN' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_MIN_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-MIN' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_MIN_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-MIN' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_MIN_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-HLP' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_HLP_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-HLP' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_HLP_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-HLP' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_HLP_Total

FROM CSE2
GROUP BY `Country ISO3`, Country
ORDER BY Country)
SELECT 
Country
,CASE WHEN ALL_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN ALL_Coverage END AS `Total Coverage`
,CASE WHEN ALL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(ALL_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(ALL_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Total Coverage Rank`

,CASE WHEN EDU_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN EDU_Coverage END AS `Education`
,CASE WHEN EDU_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(EDU_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(EDU_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Education Rank`

,CASE WHEN FSC_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN FSC_Coverage END AS `Food, Security and Agriculture`
,CASE WHEN FSC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(FSC_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(FSC_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Food, Security and Agriculture Rank`

,CASE WHEN HEA_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN HEA_Coverage END AS `Health`
,CASE WHEN HEA_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(HEA_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(HEA_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Health Rank`

,CASE WHEN MPC_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN MPC_Coverage END AS `Multipurpose Cash`
,CASE WHEN MPC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(MPC_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(MPC_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Multipurpose Cash Rank`

,CASE WHEN NUT_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN NUT_Coverage END AS `Nutrition`
,CASE WHEN NUT_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(NUT_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(NUT_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Nutrition Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_Coverage END AS `Protection (overall)`
,CASE WHEN PRO_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(PRO_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Protection (overall) Rank`

,CASE WHEN SHL_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN SHL_Coverage END AS `Emergency, Shelter and NFI`
,CASE WHEN SHL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(SHL_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(SHL_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Emergency, Shelter and NFI Rank`

,CASE WHEN WSH_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN WSH_Coverage END AS `Water, Sanitation and Hygiene`
,CASE WHEN WSH_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(WSH_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(WSH_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Water, Sanitation and Hygiene Rank`

,CASE WHEN CCM_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN CCM_Coverage END AS `Camp Coordination and Camp Management`
,CASE WHEN CCM_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(CCM_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(CCM_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Camp Coordination and Camp Management Rank`

,CASE WHEN MS_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN MS_Coverage END AS `Refugee Response`
,CASE WHEN MS_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(MS_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(MS_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Refugee Response Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_CPN_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_CPN_Coverage END AS `Child Protection`
,CASE WHEN PRO_CPN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(PRO_CPN_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_CPN_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Child Protection Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_GBV_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_GBV_Coverage END AS `Gender-Based Violence (GBV)`
,CASE WHEN PRO_GBV_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(PRO_GBV_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_GBV_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Gender-Based Violence (GBV) Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_MIN_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_MIN_Coverage END AS `Anti-mine Struggle`
,CASE WHEN PRO_MIN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(PRO_MIN_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_MIN_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Anti-mine Struggle Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_HLP_Coverage IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_HLP_Coverage END AS `Housing, Land and Property`
,CASE WHEN PRO_HLP_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CAST(PRO_HLP_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_HLP_Total AS STRING)) ELSE '' END AS `Housing, Land and Property Rank`-- ,CASE WHEN ALL_Rank IS NOT NULL AND ALL_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(ALL_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(ALL_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Total Coverage`
-- ,CASE WHEN EDU_Rank IS NOT NULL AND EDU_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(EDU_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(EDU_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS Education
-- ,CASE WHEN FSC_Rank IS NOT NULL AND FSC_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(FSC_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(FSC_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Food, Security and Agriculture`
-- ,CASE WHEN HEA_Rank IS NOT NULL AND HEA_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(HEA_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(HEA_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS Health
-- ,CASE WHEN MPC_Rank IS NOT NULL AND MPC_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(MPC_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(MPC_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Multipurpose Cash`
-- ,CASE WHEN NUT_Rank IS NOT NULL AND NUT_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(NUT_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(NUT_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS Nutrition
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_Rank IS NOT NULL AND PRO_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(PRO_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(PRO_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Protection (overall)`
-- ,CASE WHEN SHL_Rank IS NOT NULL AND SHL_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(SHL_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(SHL_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Emergency, Shelter and NFI`
-- ,CASE WHEN WSH_Rank IS NOT NULL AND WSH_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(WSH_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(WSH_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Water, Sanitation and Hygiene`
-- ,CASE WHEN CCM_Rank IS NOT NULL AND CCM_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(CCM_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(CCM_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Camp Coordination and Camp Management`
-- ,CASE WHEN MS_Rank IS NOT NULL AND MS_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(MS_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(MS_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Refugee Response`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_CPN_Rank IS NOT NULL AND PRO_CPN_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(PRO_CPN_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(PRO_CPN_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Child Protection`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_GBV_Rank IS NOT NULL AND PRO_GBV_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(PRO_GBV_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(PRO_GBV_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Gender-Based Violence (GBV)`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_MIN_Rank IS NOT NULL AND PRO_MIN_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(PRO_MIN_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(PRO_MIN_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Anti-mine Struggle`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_HLP_Rank IS NOT NULL AND PRO_HLP_Total <> 0 THEN CAST(PRO_HLP_Rank AS DOUBLE) / CAST(PRO_HLP_Total AS DOUBLE) END AS `Housing, Land and Property`
FROM CSE3
ORDER BY ALL_Rank ASC

WITH CSE1 AS (
    SELECT 
        hpc.`Country ISO3`,
        iso3.name AS Country,
        hpc.Cluster,
        hpc.Population,
        hpc.`In Need`,
        hpc.Targeted,
        `In Need`-Targeted AS Coverage
    FROM `workspace`.`default`.`hpc_hno_2026` AS hpc
    LEFT JOIN `workspace`.`default`.`CountryISO3Code` AS iso3
        ON hpc.`Country ISO3` = iso3.`alpha-3`
    WHERE hpc.`In Need` IS NOT NULL
    AND (Description NOT LIKE 'Protection générale' AND Description NOT LIKE 'Protection Générale') 
),
CSE2 AS (
    SELECT
        *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Cluster ORDER BY Coverage DESC) AS Rank,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY Cluster) AS Total
    FROM CSE1
)
,CSE3 AS (
SELECT
    `Country ISO3`,
    Country,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'ALL' THEN Coverage END) AS ALL_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'ALL' THEN Rank END)     AS ALL_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'ALL' THEN Total END)    AS ALL_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'EDU' THEN Coverage END) AS EDU_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'EDU' THEN Rank END)     AS EDU_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'EDU' THEN Total END)    AS EDU_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'FSC' THEN Coverage END) AS FSC_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'FSC' THEN Rank END)     AS FSC_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'FSC' THEN Total END)    AS FSC_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'HEA' THEN Coverage END) AS HEA_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'HEA' THEN Rank END)     AS HEA_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'HEA' THEN Total END)    AS HEA_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MPC' THEN Coverage END) AS MPC_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MPC' THEN Rank END)     AS MPC_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MPC' THEN Total END)    AS MPC_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'NUT' THEN Coverage END) AS NUT_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'NUT' THEN Rank END)     AS NUT_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'NUT' THEN Total END)    AS NUT_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'SHL' THEN Coverage END) AS SHL_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'SHL' THEN Rank END)     AS SHL_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'SHL' THEN Total END)    AS SHL_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'WSH' THEN Coverage END) AS WSH_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'WSH' THEN Rank END)     AS WSH_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'WSH' THEN Total END)    AS WSH_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'CCM' THEN Coverage END) AS CCM_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'CCM' THEN Rank END)     AS CCM_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'CCM' THEN Total END)    AS CCM_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MS' THEN Coverage END) AS MS_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MS' THEN Rank END)     AS MS_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'MS' THEN Total END)    AS MS_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-CPN' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_CPN_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-CPN' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_CPN_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-CPN' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_CPN_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-GBV' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_GBV_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-GBV' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_GBV_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-GBV' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_GBV_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-MIN' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_MIN_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-MIN' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_MIN_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-MIN' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_MIN_Total,

    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-HLP' THEN Coverage END) AS PRO_HLP_Coverage,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-HLP' THEN Rank END)     AS PRO_HLP_Rank,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Cluster = 'PRO-HLP' THEN Total END)    AS PRO_HLP_Total

FROM CSE2
GROUP BY `Country ISO3`, Country
ORDER BY Country)
SELECT 
Country
,CASE WHEN ALL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN ALL_Coverage  END AS `Total`
,CASE WHEN ALL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(ALL_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(ALL_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Total Rank`

,CASE WHEN EDU_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN EDU_Coverage  END AS `Education`
,CASE WHEN EDU_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(EDU_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(EDU_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Education Rank`

,CASE WHEN FSC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN FSC_Coverage  END AS `Food, Security and Agriculture`
,CASE WHEN FSC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(FSC_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(FSC_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Food, Security and Agriculture Rank`

,CASE WHEN HEA_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN HEA_Coverage  END AS `Health`
,CASE WHEN HEA_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(HEA_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(HEA_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Health Rank`

,CASE WHEN MPC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN MPC_Coverage  END AS `Multipurpose Cash`
,CASE WHEN MPC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(MPC_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(MPC_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Multipurpose Cash Rank`

,CASE WHEN NUT_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN NUT_Coverage  END AS `Nutrition`
,CASE WHEN NUT_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(NUT_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(NUT_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Nutrition Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_Coverage  END AS `Protection (overall)`
,CASE WHEN PRO_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(PRO_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Protection (overall) Rank`

,CASE WHEN SHL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN SHL_Coverage  END AS `Emergency, Shelter and NFI`
,CASE WHEN SHL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(SHL_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(SHL_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Emergency, Shelter and NFI Rank`

,CASE WHEN WSH_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN WSH_Coverage  END AS `Water, Sanitation and Hygiene`
,CASE WHEN WSH_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(WSH_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(WSH_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Water, Sanitation and Hygiene Rank`

,CASE WHEN CCM_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CCM_Coverage  END AS `Camp Coordination and Camp Management`
,CASE WHEN CCM_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(CCM_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(CCM_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Camp Coordination and Camp Management Rank`

,CASE WHEN MS_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN MS_Coverage  END AS `Refugee Response`
,CASE WHEN MS_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(MS_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(MS_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Refugee Response Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_CPN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_CPN_Coverage  END AS `Child Protection`
,CASE WHEN PRO_CPN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(PRO_CPN_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_CPN_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Child Protection Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_GBV_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_GBV_Coverage  END AS `Gender-Based Violence (GBV)`
,CASE WHEN PRO_GBV_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(PRO_GBV_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_GBV_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Gender-Based Violence (GBV) Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_MIN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_MIN_Coverage  END AS `Anti-mine Struggle`
,CASE WHEN PRO_MIN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(PRO_MIN_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_MIN_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Anti-mine Struggle Rank`

,CASE WHEN PRO_HLP_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN PRO_HLP_Coverage  END AS `Housing, Land and Property`
,CASE WHEN PRO_HLP_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT("(",CAST(PRO_HLP_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_HLP_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Housing, Land and Property Rank`
-- ,CASE WHEN ALL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(ALL_Coverage," (",CAST(ALL_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(ALL_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Total Coverage`
-- ,CASE WHEN EDU_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(EDU_Coverage," (",CAST(EDU_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(EDU_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS Education
-- ,CASE WHEN FSC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(FSC_Coverage," (",CAST(FSC_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(FSC_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Food, Security and Agriculture`
-- ,CASE WHEN HEA_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(HEA_Coverage," (",CAST(HEA_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(HEA_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS Health
-- ,CASE WHEN MPC_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(MPC_Coverage," (",CAST(MPC_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(MPC_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Multipurpose Cash`
-- ,CASE WHEN NUT_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(NUT_Coverage," (",CAST(NUT_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(NUT_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS Nutrition
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(PRO_Coverage," (",CAST(PRO_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Protection (overall)`
-- ,CASE WHEN SHL_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(SHL_Coverage," (",CAST(SHL_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(SHL_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Emergency, Shelter and NFI`
-- ,CASE WHEN WSH_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(WSH_Coverage," (",CAST(WSH_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(WSH_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Water, Sanitation and Hygiene`
-- ,CASE WHEN CCM_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(CCM_Coverage," (",CAST(CCM_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(CCM_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Camp Coordination and Camp Management`
-- ,CASE WHEN MS_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(MS_Coverage," (",CAST(MS_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(MS_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Refugee Response`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_CPN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(PRO_CPN_Coverage," (",CAST(PRO_CPN_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_CPN_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Child Protection`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_GBV_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(PRO_GBV_Coverage," (",CAST(PRO_GBV_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_GBV_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Gender-Based Violence (GBV)`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_MIN_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(PRO_MIN_Coverage," (",CAST(PRO_MIN_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_MIN_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Anti-mine Struggle`
-- ,CASE WHEN PRO_HLP_Rank IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(PRO_HLP_Coverage," (",CAST(PRO_HLP_Rank AS STRING),"/",CAST(PRO_HLP_Total AS STRING),")")  END AS `Housing, Land and Property`
FROM CSE3
ORDER BY all_coverage DESC

fields.name: Camp Coordination and Camp Management Rank

frame.description: 1: highest number of people, 20: lowest number of people

columns.fieldName: Camp Coordination and Camp Management Rank

lines: # Dashboard - Ranking based on Global Humanitarian Programme Cycle
### Table of People Targeted by Aid for given Purpose, represented as a % of people In Need (Coverage)
### Countries Most In Need of Aid #### based on proportion of people in need being targeted by aid
### Countries Most In Need of Aid #### based on remaining number of people in need of aid but not yet targeted
